511
International Classification of Goods and Services for the Purposes of the Registration of Marks (Nice Classification) - NCL(10-2015)
09

Eyeglasses; sunglasses; swim goggles; pince-nez; spectacles (optics); cases for eyeglasses; spectacle lenses; eyeglass chains; eyeglass frames; contact lenses; contact lens washing apparatus; containers for contact lenses.

Lunettes de vue; lunettes de soleil; lunettes de natation; pince-nez; lunettes (optique); étuis pour lunettes; verres de lunettes; chaînettes de lunettes; montures de lunettes de vue; lentilles de contact; appareils de nettoyage pour lentilles de contact; étuis pour lentilles de contact.

Gafas; gafas de sol; gafas de natación; quevedos; gafas (óptica); estuches para gafas; cristales de gafas; cadenas para gafas; armaduras de gafas; lentes de contacto; aparatos para lavar lentes de contacto; estuches para lentes de contacto.

09

Eyeglasses; sunglasses; swim goggles; pince-nez; spectacles (optics); cases for eyeglasses; spectacle lenses; eyeglass chains; eyeglass frames; contact lenses; containers for contact lenses.

Disclaimer: The registration of a mark in the International Register does not imply the expression of any opinion whatsoever on the part of the International Bureau of WIPO concerning the substance of the entitlement claim under the Madrid Protocol and its Regulations, or of the legal status of any country, territory, city or area or of its authorities, or concerning the delimitation of its frontiers or boundaries.
